q: If you are not cringe enough, you are not living enough!
Be happy with what you have while working for what you want.
If you're trying to love yourself, you already do. Where do you think the trying comes from?
It's okay to embarass yourself a little in the pursuit of human connection.
Where your fear is, there your task is.
What would life be if we had no courage to attempt anything?
You are the universe experiencing itself.
